Off Calendar May-20-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF CHRISTIE WEST.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/SRB)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-22-2022 Continued To May-20-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Domenic Scire, Esq. (408.295.5555) Moving party.

Discussed. Mr. Scire requested a continuance so that he can personally serve his motion.
The court rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF CHRISTIE WEST is continued to May 20, 2022.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)
